data.title: Tax Season Means Fake W-2 and W-9 Scams Warns eMazzanti Technologies President Carl Mazzanti
data.description: In Hoboken, N.J., on April 21, 2026, it was reported that despite the recent passing of the April 15 tax deadline, Cybercriminals are actively carrying out an influx of payroll and vendor fraud schemes by utilizing fake W-2 and W-9 forms. As per the latest FBI Internet Crime Report, losses from Cybercrime incidents involving such scams are on the rise.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts Celebrates Leadership, Performance and Community Impact at 2026 Washy Awards
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC) recently held a two-day Leadership Summit in Columbus, Ohio, bringing together team members, industry partners, and award winners. The summit took place on April 21, 2026, amidst EWC's impressive growth and philanthropic efforts. The company has recorded over $755,000 in charitable contributions. EWC stands out as a rapidly expanding and highly esteemed express car wash brand in the nation.

data.title: Hamachi.ai Brings fpPathfinder Planning Intelligence Into Its AI Command Center
data.description: An AI-powered Wealth Intelligence Platform, Hamachi.ai, has partnered with fpPathfinder to provide financial planning expertise to investment advisors and asset managers. The integration will offer context-aware and compliant guidance within advisor workflows via the Hamachi Command Center. This collaboration ensures that advisors have access to reliable financial planning resources at their fingertips for more informed decision-making.

data.title: Huron Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Webcast
data.description: Chicago-based company Huron (NASDAQ: HURN) is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The conference call led by CEO C. Mark Hussey and CFO John D. Kelly will take place on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (4:00 p.m. Central Time). The call will be broadcasted online.

data.title: Supermicro to Report Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results on May 5th, 2026
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI), a leading total solution provider for AI, Enterprise, Storage, and 5G/Edge technologies, will conduct a conference call to discuss its third-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5th, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT. The webcast can be accessed at https://ir.supermicro.com. For those unable to attend, a replay will be posted on the same website shortly after the call.

data.title: AcuityMD Lands $80 Million in New Funding to Fuel AI Innovation in Medical Device (MedTech) Industry
data.description: In Boston, AcuityMD, a leading AI platform for MedTech, has secured a substantial $80 million in new funding to enhance its platform with advanced AI features. The primary goal is to expedite the uptake of medical technology. This funding, part of the Series C round, was primarily backed by StepStone Group, along with participation from Benchmark, Redpoint Ventures, ICONIQ, and Atreides Management. Currently, AcuityMD supports 16 out of the top 20 MedTech companies.

data.title: XRP holders see gains with potential for 55% rise to $2.24, requiring price to stay above $1.40.
data.description: A large majority of XRP investors have seen their investments recover, raising the possibility of a surge to $2.24. However, for this to happen, buyers need to maintain the price above $1.40.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rallies On Surprise Retail Data; UnitedHealth Surges On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase today following the unexpected rise in retail sales figures. The market also eagerly anticipates the upcoming Kevin Warsh hearing. UnitedHealth saw a significant surge in stock value. The day's developments point to a positive trend in the stock market, with the Dow Jones rallying on the surprise retail data and UnitedHealth's remarkable earnings boosting investor confidence.
New regions of Russia should reach the national living standard by 2030 - Putin

data.title: Forum Investment Group Selected for Envestnet UMA Platform Interval Fund Lineup, Featuring Forum Real Estate Income Fund (FORAX)
data.description: Denver-based Forum Investment Group revealed today that its Forum Real Estate Income Fund (FORAX) has been chosen to join Envestnet’s Unified Managed Account (UMA) platform. This move positions Forum as one of the exclusive asset managers featured in Envestnet’s extended interval fund initiative, allowing financial advisors to integrate alternative investment approaches into UMA portfolios along with ETFs, mutual funds, and separately managed accounts. This development signifies a significant opportunity for growth and diversification within Envestnet’s platform, broadening the investment options available to advisors and their clients.

data.title: ROOM and Carolina Introduce New Approach to Privacy in Healthcare Environments for Guests, Patients and Caregivers
data.description: In a joint partnership, ROOM and Carolina have unveiled the ROOM x Carolina Phone Booth, the debut privacy pod tailored for healthcare settings. This innovative collaboration combines ROOM's renowned soundproof and modular design with Carolina's extensive experience in healthcare furnishings. The Phone Booth is crafted to address the distinct requirements of medical facilities, including hospitals and clinics, offering essential private spaces. Marking a milestone in healthcare design, this initiative aims to enhance the overall experience for patients and staff.

data.title: Homes.com Shares Most Expensive Home Sales Across Major U.S. Markets in March
data.description: A report by Homes.com, a subsidiary of CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), revealed the priciest publicly listed home sales in major U.S. cities for March. The findings, accessible online, showcase the top property transactions in key metropolitan regions, drawn from MLS data. Miami claimed the highest sale of the month, involving a future construction reaching a record value. This analysis presents the top closed deals for March across various markets, shedding light on real estate trends and high-end purchases.

data.title: Apartment List Launches the A-Suite Board, an Invitation-Only Advisory Program Leading up to AIM Conference
data.description: A new advisory program called the A-Suite Board has been launched by Apartment List, a multifamily leasing platform powered by AI. The program consists of 35 esteemed executives and operators within the industry. This exclusive invitation-only board aims to involve these leaders in the decision-making process before product launches, influence long-term strategic plans, and enhance relationships with partners who grasp the significance of the industry. The program is set to have a significant impact on the multifamily sector.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT Announces April 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) declared its April 2026 monthly distribution at 5.833 cents per Unit (equivalent to 70 cents annually). The distribution will be paid on May 15, 2026, to unitholders as of April 30, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, Dream Industrial REIT oversees a varied global portfolio of strategically placed industrial properties.

data.title: Dream Office REIT Announces April 2026 Monthly Distribution
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) disclosed its April 2026 monthly distribution of 8.333 cents ($1.00 annualized) per REIT Unit, Series A. The distribution for April will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as at April 30, 2026. Dream Office REIT, an unincorporated, open-ended real estate investment trust, serves as a leading office landlord in downtown Toronto, controlling over 4.0 million square feet.

data.title: Hospitality Ventures Management Group (HVMG) Expands Renovation and Development Services Under Elevate
data.description: Hospitality Ventures Management Group has reported an ongoing expansion of Elevate Renovations + Development.

data.title: Reliable Robotics Announces $160M in New Investment
data.description: In Mountain View, California, a prominent company in autonomous aircraft systems, Reliable Robotics, has just revealed securing a substantial $160 million in fresh funding. This funding aims to expedite the deployment and ramp up production of their cutting-edge Reliable Autonomy System (RAS). This system is the initial Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) certified system that enables complete automated operation of an aircraft. The funding comes on the heels of commitments for more than 200 systems from both commercial and military clients, as well as selection by the United States Department of Transportation.

data.title: Solace Expands Insurance Coverage for Healthcare Advocacy
data.description: Solace Health has recently broadened its insurance coverage to include several prominent health plans in San Francisco. This move will extend access to professional healthcare advocates to a significantly larger number of Americans, potentially benefiting millions of individuals.
Issuer 21Shares AG has published a UK Base Prospectus.

data.title: PuroClean Looks to Expand to the California Bay Area Amid Rising Demand for Services Due to Weather, Fires and Everyday Property Issues
data.description: PuroClean, a prominent property restoration and remediation franchise, is currently providing franchise and conversion prospects in Northern California. With headquarters in Tamarac, Fla., the company disclosed its intention to broaden its presence in this region on April 21, 2026. This move signifies an effort to penetrate the market further and capitalize on the growing demand for restoration services.
